key_points: Rakesh lived with his grandfather in Mussoorie so that he could attend school
He planted a cherry seed in the garden after eating cherries from the bazaar
The small cherry plant faced many difficulties but continued to grow
Rakesh patiently protected and cared for the plant
After a few years the cherry tree produced a beautiful pink blossom
examples: Rakesh planted the cherry seed after his grandfather suggested it
A goat ate the leaves of the young plant but it survived
A woman accidentally cut the plant with a scythe while cutting grass
Rakesh removed insects like caterpillars to protect the plant
Birds later came to eat the cherries from the grown tree
formulas_or_processes: Obstacle → Plant damaged by goat and grass cutter
Care → Rakesh waters and protects the plant
Growth → The plant grows into a cherry tree with blossoms
exam_tips: Understand how the cherry tree grows despite several challenges
Remember the role of Rakesh’s grandfather in guiding him
Focus on the importance of patience and care in the story
Explain how the cherry tree symbolizes growth and perseverance
